system_prompt:
You are a senior web strategist at a digital agency specializing in SEO, conversion optimization, and UX.
Analyze this webpage using ONLY the provided metrics and content.
Specifically check for Heading Hierarchy Violations (e.g., H3 appearing before any H2, missing H1, level skips).
You MUST reference specific metrics by name and value in your findings (e.g., 'Word count of 300' or '80% of images lack alt text').
Do not make generic statements. Provide scores from 1-10 for each category along with findings and evidence.
user_prompt:
## Page Metrics Summary
- Word Count: 421
- CTA Count: 3
- Internal/External Links: 15 / 2
- Images: 5 total (2 totally missing alt, 0 intentionally empty alt="")
- Title: Welcome to Acme Corp
- Description: Acme Corp is the leading provider of widgets.

## Heading Hierarchy
[
  ["H2", "About Us"],
  ["H3", "Our Team"],
  ["H2", "Pricing"]
]

## Page Content (Excerpts)
Welcome to Acme Corp
...

structure_analysis.findings: The page lacks an H1 tag and starts directly with an H2 ('About Us'). This is a severe SEO hierarchy violation.
structure_analysis.evidence: Heading hierarchy shows first element is H2, missing H1

messaging_analysis.findings: Messaging is clear but word count is very low.

cta_analysis.findings: CTAs are present but not abundant.

content_depth_analysis.findings: Content is thin, with only 421 words it may struggle to rank for competitive terms.

ux_analysis.evidence: 2 images are totally missing alt text out of 5 total images (40%).

system_prompt:
You are a senior web consultant.
Based on the provided audit analysis and raw metrics, provide 3 to 5 highly prioritized, actionable recommendations.
Your recommendations MUST be directly grounded in the metrics or the structured analysis.
Specify the grounded metric (e.g. 'H1 hierarchy violation: H3 found before H2' or '5 missing alt tags').
user_prompt:
## Raw Metrics
Word Count: 421
Missing Alt Tags: 2
Title: Welcome to Acme Corp
Description: Acme Corp is the leading provider of widgets.
Headings: {'h1': 0, 'h2': 2, 'h3': 1, 'h4': 0, 'h5': 0, 'h6': 0}

## Structured Analysis
Overall Score: 5/10
Structure Score: 3
Messaging Score: 7
CTA Score: 6
Content Depth Score: 5
UX Score: 4

Return a list of strictly 3 to 5 recommendations matching the JSON schema.
raw_response:
[
  {
    "priority": 1,
    "category": "seo",
    "title": "Fix the missing H1 tag",
    "description": "The page completely lacks an H1 tag and begins with an H2. This is a severe SEO penalty and harms structure.",
    "grounded_metric": "Heading hierarchy shows no H1, first element is H2",
    "action": "Add a single, descriptive H1 tag to the top of the page.",
    "expected_impact": "High"
  },
  {
    "priority": 2,
    "category": "ux",
    "title": "Add missing alt text to images",
    "description": "There are images that are totally missing alt text, which is an accessibility violation and a missed SEO opportunity.",
    "grounded_metric": "2 images totally missing alt text (40%)",
    "action": "Audit all images and add descriptive alt tags, or use empty alt='' if purely decorative.",
    "expected_impact": "Medium"
  },
  {
    "priority": 3,
    "category": "content",
    "title": "Expand content depth",
    "description": "The page is quite thin. Expanding the word count will provide more context to search engines and users.",
    "grounded_metric": "Word Count: 421",
    "action": "Add 300-500 words of relevant content, perhaps expanding on 'Pricing' or 'About Us'.",
    "expected_impact": "Medium"
  }
]

parsed_response.title: Fix the missing H1 tag
parsed_response.description: The page completely lacks an H1 tag and begins with an H2. This is a severe SEO penalty and harms structure.
parsed_response.grounded_metric: Heading hierarchy shows no H1, first element is H2
parsed_response.action: Add a single, descriptive H1 tag to the top of the page.

parsed_response.title: Add missing alt text to images
parsed_response.description: There are images that are totally missing alt text, which is an accessibility violation and a missed SEO opportunity.
parsed_response.action: Audit all images and add descriptive alt tags, or use empty alt='' if purely decorative.

parsed_response.title: Expand content depth
parsed_response.description: The page is quite thin. Expanding the word count will provide more context to search engines and users.
parsed_response.action: Add 300-500 words of relevant content, perhaps expanding on 'Pricing' or 'About Us'.
